[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101000 2
1 00100010 2
2 01101010 4
3 11000101 4
4 01010111 5
5 11010011 5
6 11010100 4
7 01100001 3

01 00000000 a
12 00101010 3
23 10000000 1
34 00000100 1
45 00000011 2
56 10010100 3
67 00000001 1
70 01011000 3

13 00101000 2 match 0
